sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value String, created_at DateTime, flag Int8);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'high_value', now(), 10), (2, 'low_value', now() - interval 1 day, 0), (3, '', now(), 1);
SELECT globalVariable('max_allowed_packet') AS packet_size, (id + 5) AS adjusted_id FROM test_table WHERE value != '';
SELECT id, globalVariable('max_allowed_packet') + toInt32(NULL) AS computed_value FROM test_table WHERE created_at < now() AND flag IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(id + globalVariable('max_allowed_packet')) AS avg_id FROM test_table GROUP BY flag HAVING avg_id > 5;
SELECT id, (SELECT globalVariable('max_allowed_packet') FROM system.variables) + (value + 'extra') AS combined_value FROM test_table WHERE flag = 1;
CREATE TABLE temp_table (data Float64, description String);
SELECT globalVariable('max_allowed_packet') + (data + 2.5) AS total FROM temp_table WHERE description IS NULL;
SELECT id, SUM((created_at + INTERVAL 1 DAY) - globalVariable('max_allowed_packet')) AS time_diff FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING time_diff > 0;
